# GraphMindset

> Knowledge graph explorer and ontology editor

GraphMindset lets you explore, search, and build knowledge graphs. Define your own ontology with custom node types and relationships, add content from URLs, and visualize the connections between ideas, people, and things.

## Features

- Search and explore knowledge graph nodes
- Visual ontology/schema editor
- Add content from Twitter, YouTube, RSS, GitHub, and web pages
- Boost content with Lightning payments
- Media playback for audio/video content
